content.title: Our Model
content.subtitle: Data Analytics
content.paragraph1: The Data Analytics area is based on a comprehensive and open-source solution for student retention supported by technology, where Machine Learning and Big Data are used to respond to early warnings of student dropout risk and analyze the root causes that produce it.
content.paragraph2: In addition, through a web application, intervention cases are managed to act on the data and support is provided for proper adoption from the wellness area with expert consultations on retention.

donation.description: At the Foundation Antivirus for Dropout Prevention, we are a non-profit organization that seeks to reduce student dropout levels in Colombia, improve retention and graduation rates, this being our way of contributing to achieving a country with more education and consequently more development.
donation.monthly_payment: Allow the payment to be monthly according to the mentioned amount

qhfa.intervention_description: This is the foundation's field of action that aims to identify and understand the particularities of the sociocultural and socio-emotional context of students, to influence, transform and significantly impact their conditions and educational process, through tools and alternatives for socio-pedagogical support. The social team is composed of social workers and psychologists responsible for designing and implementing academic strengthening strategies, psycho-emotional and socio-pedagogical support. This area has the following social intervention lines:
qhfa.academic_description: Search for tutors and mentors willing to receive a modest hourly stipend and offer another voluntary hour. In this sense, once tutors are found, this area is responsible for creating appointments for one-on-one tutoring and thematic workshops for complementary class review and study groups.

support_list.mental_health: Supervising, guiding and attending to students with problems in their mental state and emotional health.
support_list.vocational_guidance: Providing guidance on vocational or family situations,
support_list.strengthen_skills: Helping to strengthen students' socio-emotional skills and self-esteem.
support_list.organize_workshops: Organizing workshops, meetings and focus groups to strengthen socio-emotional and vocational skills.

content.description: The accompaniment and the people who do it are very important because you feel confident and feel that you are learning something... The fact that they come with questions that do not force but encourage you to give an answer has made me better prepared for my future or at least have a better idea of what I am doing today for my future.
content.author: - Samuel Durango Baena

content.description: We have learned to know each other quite well. It has been personal growth, I have learned to love myself, to know myself more deeply, to look at what I want for my life in a few years and to know that I have made great progress in myself. That I have to be consistent with what I want to achieve and that I have to have fixed purposes. In the future, I imagine myself as a great professional, having my own company or brand or being independent.
content.author: - Salomé Arango

content.description: Honestly, before Antivirus arrived, I was very insecure about what I was going to study or what I was going to do with my life because no one knows what will happen in the future because it is uncertain. But Antivirus arrived and little by little has been able to give us security, has taught us that everything in life has a solution and our problems can become capacities for ourselves.
content.author: - Estiwar Espinal

content.description: Antivirus has done a wonderful job, thanks to Antivirus I have tried to let go of that fear of the future, it has calmed things down a lot, we as 11th-grade students carry several responsibilities and we are very concerned about what will happen after school, what will I do? And Antivirus has helped us to know ourselves a little more and to know what I can dedicate myself to or which path to take.
content.author: - Antonia Aristizábal

content.description: The accompaniment seemed very pleasant to me, my greatest learning was in decision-making, understanding my emotions better, thinking before acting. You managed to make me more confident about the decisions I want to make in my life. What I liked the most were the talks, the methodology, and the theme, that enlightened us.
content.author: - Matías González
